center.name: 比勒陀利亞
center.summary: 比勒陀利亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Swainson's spurfowl、Woodland kingfisher、River warbler等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The greater striped swallow (Cecropis cucullata) is a large swallow that is native to Africa south of the equator

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in eastern and central Europe and is migratory, wintering in inland southern Africa, from around the Zambezi River south to the vicinity of Pretoria in South Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Swainson's spurfowl or Swainson's francolin (Pternistis swainsonii) is a species of bird in the family Phasianidae which is native to southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The woodland kingfisher is widely distributed in tropical Africa south of the Sahara and from Pretoria northwards
